items.description: Disabled vehicle on I-95 northbound between 1 miles NORTH of Exit 22: I-676/US 30 - CENTRAL PHILA/CALLOWHILL ST and Exit 25: ALLEGHENY AVE/CASTOR AVE. There is a lane restriction.
